editionData.title: June 28, 2026: U.S. says it hit targets in Iran as hostilities erupt over Hormuz for third day; These homes rose out of Venezuela’s socialist...
editionData.description: Global headlines: U.S. says it hit targets in Iran as hostilities erupt over Hormuz for third day (Washington and Tehran differ over whether Iran has a say in which vessels can cross the crucial waterway and when, leading to the latest flare-up); These homes rose out of Venezuela’s socialist revolution. Now they’re rubble. (In the absence of government help, ordinary Venezuelans dug barehanded through the rubble of the week’s earthquakes for loved ones); and Unease deepens in Russia as Ukraine steps up long-range strikes (Experts said Vladimir Putin was unlikely to change course despite worsening fuel shortages and a sharp decline in the stock market). Markets leaned lower, with 6 of 7 tracked indexes down; Nikkei 225 down 4.15% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Marfa Public Radio Puts You to Sleep (Marfa Public Radio is literally never asleep. It operates 24/7 (except when lightning strikes) and there’s so much that goes on behind the...); Show HN: Decomp Academy – Learn to decompile GameCube games into matching C (Learn to decompile GameCube PowerPC assembly into byte-matching C, graded live by the real MWCC GC/2.0 compiler); and AMD Strix Halo RDMA Cluster Setup Guide (Contribute to kyuz0/amd-strix-halo-vllm-toolboxes development by creating an account on GitHub). Product Hunt features Epilogue. Write novels, scripts & poetry (The professional book writing app built for serious authors), Cloud World Model (Simulate AWS, GCP & DigitalOcean without paying the bill), and RetroMac (Turn your Mac into a time machine).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: U.S. says it hit targets in Iran as hostilities erupt over Hormuz for third day
headlines.summary: Washington and Tehran differ over whether Iran has a say in which vessels can cross the crucial waterway and when, leading to the latest flare-up.

headlines.title: These homes rose out of Venezuela’s socialist revolution. Now they’re rubble.
headlines.summary: In the absence of government help, ordinary Venezuelans dug barehanded through the rubble of the week’s earthquakes for loved ones.

headlines.title: Unease deepens in Russia as Ukraine steps up long-range strikes
headlines.summary: Experts said Vladimir Putin was unlikely to change course despite worsening fuel shortages and a sharp decline in the stock market.

headlines.title: Ukrainian drones drive Russia to declare emergency in occupied Crimea
headlines.summary: Weeks of punishing strikes have disrupted water, fuel and electricity supplies across the peninsula, which Ukraine’s president has vowed to reclaim.

headlines.title: When it comes to soccer, there is no such thing as a United Kingdom
headlines.summary: In this year's World Cup, Scotland’s second favorite team is anyone playing England.

headlines.title: Air raid sirens in Bahrain, Kuwait; US bombs Iran again over Hormuz attacks
headlines.summary: US president threatens to 'militarily complete the job' as the US strikes Sirik and Qeshm Island over ship attacks.

headlines.title: US launches second night of strikes on Iran after ship hit by drone
headlines.summary: The attacks come after an alleged Iranian drone struck another commercial vessel in the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday.

headlines.title: Donald Trump nominates ex-state trooper Lance Schroyer as ICE director
headlines.summary: The immigration enforcement agency has been without a Senate-confirmed director since 2017, during Trump's first term.

headlines.title: Serbia’s President Aleksandar Vucic says will resign within ‘weeks’
headlines.summary: Vucic is under ⁠pressure after months ⁠of antigovernment protests.

headlines.title: Another powerful magnitude 4.8 earthquake hits near Venezuela
headlines.summary: The latest quake comes as rescuers are still searching for survivors of the twin 7.2 and 7.5 earthquakes on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Trump nominates former Oklahoma state trooper to head ICE
headlines.summary: President Trump nominated Lance Schroyer, a former Oklahoma state trooper, to direct Immigration and Customs Enforcement. The agency hasn't had a Senate-confirmed director since the Obama administration.

headlines.title: Critical fire weather complicates firefighting efforts in massive Utah wildfire
headlines.summary: Firefighters working on the nation's largest current wildfire, burning in southern Utah, are being challenged by historic weather conditions. Extreme wildfire behavior is expected to continue through the weekend.

headlines.title: Uzbekistan makes its World Cup debut, a first for Central Asia
headlines.summary: The country is the first Central Asian nation to qualify for the World Cup, and Uzbek fans have reveled in showcasing their country and culture. The country's president calls the team a symbol of the "new Uzbekistan."

headlines.title: Opinion: Ranch dressing is a winner at the World Cup games
headlines.summary: NPR's Scott Simon reflects on the popularity of ranch dressing among international visitors to the U.S. during the World Cup games.

headlines.title: Trump administration partially lifts export ban on Anthropic's most advanced AI model
headlines.summary: The U.S. government is asserting a new level of influence over AI, controlling which companies can access Anthropic's new models. OpenAI agreed to let the administration screen users of its new model.

headlines.title: Wang Yi highlights Austria's role in China-Europe links
headlines.summary: China's Foreign Minister has called on Austria to continue playing a constructive role in China-European Union ties, saying the two sides should regard each other as partners rather than rivals, and that Europe should view China's development as an opportunity, not a challenge.

headlines.title: Australian wool sector rides evolving market trends
headlines.summary: Australia's pillar wool sector is reaping the rewards from record-high prices as it rides on consumption upgrades and other strengths in its biggest market, China, according to latest figures.

headlines.title: White paper charts path for governance reform
headlines.summary: International affairs experts view China's newly released white paper as a significant and timely contribution to discussions on reforming the global governance system amid mounting challenges such as geopolitical tensions, economic fragmentation and development deficits.

headlines.title: Rescue underway after deadly quakes hit Venezuela
headlines.summary: Venezuela's health ministry raised the death toll to at least 235 on Thursday evening after two powerful earthquakes struck the country a day earlier.

headlines.title: GCC members welcome US-Iran interim truce
headlines.summary: A ministerial meeting between the United States and Gulf nations held in Bahrain on Thursday welcomed the interim Iran-US deal to end hostilities, while emphasizing that any tolls or control over the Strait of Hormuz is unacceptable.

headlines.title: Intelligence alert issued over possible Khalistani terror threat to Delhi, Uttarakhand; vigil intensified
headlines.summary: Intelligence agencies raise alert over potential Khalistani terror threats in Delhi and Uttarakhand, intensifying security measures.

headlines.title: Ram Temple donation row: Champat Rai, Anil Mishra resign
headlines.summary: Champat Rai resigns as General Secretary of the Ram Janambhoomi Trust amid corruption allegations related to temple donations.

headlines.title: Help end ‘proxy war’ by armed Kuki groups, Manipur Naga body urges PM
headlines.summary: Naga organisations urge PM Modi to intervene against armed Kuki groups waging a proxy war in Manipur's Naga areas.

headlines.title: In a U-turn, Punjab government notifies VB-G RAM G scheme
headlines.summary: Punjab government reverses stance, notifying the VB-G RAM G rural employment scheme despite previous opposition, effective July 1, 2026.

headlines.title: Two BJP-led States question wage burden under VB-G RAM G
headlines.summary: BJP-led states challenge wage burdens under VB-G RAM G, citing funding concerns, wage revisions, and delays in payments.

headlines.title: Iran, US continue escalating attacks, recriminations over peace deal
headlines.summary: Reuters: Iran, US continue escalating attacks, recriminations over peace deal.

headlines.title: Serbian President Vucic says he will resign within weeks
headlines.summary: Reuters: Serbian President Vucic says he will resign within weeks.

headlines.title: Trump says he will nominate Lance Schroyer as ICE director
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump says he will nominate Lance Schroyer as ICE director.

headlines.title: Senior US officials frustrated by Machado bid to return to Venezuela after quakes, White House official says
headlines.summary: Reuters: Senior US officials frustrated by Machado bid to return to Venezuela after quakes, White House official says.

headlines.title: Tanzania has nationwide blackout after power grid failure, Bloomberg News reports
headlines.summary: Reuters: Tanzania has nationwide blackout after power grid failure, Bloomberg News reports.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Marfa Public Radio Puts You to Sleep
hackerNews.summary: Marfa Public Radio is literally never asleep. It operates 24/7 (except when lightning strikes) and there’s so much that goes on behind the scenes to make this happen– fundraising, compliance, protocols, emergency response, maintenance…the list goes on and on.Do you lay awake wondering what FCC compliance entails? Ever wondered what NPR's code of journalistic ethics involves for the newsroom?We may never be able to explain what it takes to operate the station, but we can put you to sleep trying to.For this fall membership drive we bring you Marfa Public Radio Puts You to Sleep. It's a sleep podcast wherein we read you the boring documents essential to our jobs, in the hopes we might lull you into slumber.We do actually hope that you fall asleep listening to this, but when you wake up, help us continue to read our boring documents and keep Marfa Public Radio awake by donating to the station at marfapublicradio.org/donate.

hackerNews.title: Show HN: Decomp Academy – Learn to decompile GameCube games into matching C
hackerNews.summary: Learn to decompile GameCube PowerPC assembly into byte-matching C, graded live by the real MWCC GC/2.0 compiler.

hackerNews.title: Choosing a Public DNS Resolver
hackerNews.summary: Pick what matters to you, such as privacy, malware blocking, parental controls, speed, IPv6, or a specific jurisdiction, and the finder narrows 29 global public resolvers to the ones that fit. A full comparison table and research-backed decision notes follow.

hackerNews.title: Anonymous GitHub account mass-dropping undisclosed 0-days
hackerNews.summary: A single archive of public exploit PoCs and vulnerability research writeups. At the time I post these, none have been reported. Feel free to report them yourself and take credit for the CVE if hand...

hackerNews.title: OpenRA
hackerNews.summary: Classic strategy games rebuilt for the modern era

hackerNews.title: Response to AI slop is from Robin Williams
Enhancing X11 Application Security with LXC
hackerNews.summary: Wouldn't it be nice to add an extra layer of security to a web browser or an Electron-based IM application? After all, if a browser is compromised, the user’s entire home directory may be at risk.

hackerNews.title: Fintech Engineering Handbook
hackerNews.summary: Patterns for building software that handles money

hackerNews.title: The case for physical media ownership
hackerNews.summary: An overview of physical media ownership, streaming shutdowns, content removals, and the limits of digital licenses.
